nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Manasseh and all that he did and his sin which he committed, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Manasseh and all that he did, and the sin that he committed, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?

cnv.text: 瑪拿西其餘的事蹟和他所行的一切，以及他所犯的眾罪，不是都記錄在猶大列王的年代誌上嗎？

ccb.text: 玛拿西其他的事及其一切所作所为都记在犹大的列王史上。
